Intro.Title: Algorithm Analysis
Intro.Text: Explore and understand the fundamentals of key algorithms. An educational platform from the Catholic University of Bolivia.
MiddleBlock.Title: Learn Visually
MiddleBlock.Text: Our graph tool allows you to visualize and manipulate data structures in real-time, facilitating the understanding of abstract concepts.
About.Title: About the Course
About.Text: This site serves as interactive support for the Analysis of Algorithms course, providing visual tools and detailed explanations.
About.Section1.Title: Interactive Graphs
About.Section1.Content: Create, edit, and analyze directed and undirected graphs with our specialized tool.
About.Section2.Title: Educational Videos
About.Section2.Content: Access a curated collection of videos explaining key algorithms step-by-step.
Contact.Title: Contact
Contact.Text: Álvaro Ariel Torrez Calle — Catholic University of Bolivia — alvarotorrezc@gmail.com
Product.Title: Resources
Product.Text: Access videos, interactive graphs, documentation, and support material designed for students.
